Uses of Class
org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect.MethodInfo

Packages that use MethodInfo
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.commons
 
org.apache.juneau.commons.bean
Bean-modeling layer for Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.commons.inject
Lightweight bean lookup, contribution, and injection support for Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect
Comprehensive reflection utilities for working with classes, methods, fields, constructors, and annotations in a more convenient and type-safe way than the standard Java reflection APIs.
org.apache.juneau.httppart.bean
HTTP Part Beans
org.apache.juneau.marshall
Marshalling API
org.apache.juneau.marshall.bson
BSON (Binary JSON) marshalling support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.cbor
CBOR (Concise Binary Object Representation) marshalling support per RFC 8949.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.csv
CSV Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.hjson
Hjson (Human JSON) format serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.hocon
HOCON (Human-Optimized Config Object Notation) format serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.html
HTML Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.ini
INI format serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.jena
RDF Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.json
JSON Marshalling Support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.markdown
Markdown serializer and parser support for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.msgpack
MessagePack Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.oapi
OpenAPI Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.parquet
Apache Parquet serialization and parsing support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.plaintext
Plaintext Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.soap
SOAP/XML Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.swap
Swap API
org.apache.juneau.marshall.uon
UON Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.urlencoding
URL-Encoding Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.xml
XML Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.rest.server
REST Server API
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.matcher
Predefined Matchers
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.stats
Method exec stats utilities

    Method
    Description
    static void
    InvalidAnnotationException.assertNoInvalidAnnotations(MethodInfo onMethod, Class<? extends Annotation>... types)
    Throws an InvalidAnnotationException if the specified method contains any of the specified annotations.

    AppliedAnnotationObject.BuilderM.on(MethodInfo... value)
    Appends the methods that this annotation applies to.

    AppliedAnnotationObject.BuilderMF.on(MethodInfo... value)
    Appends the methods that this annotation applies to.

  • Uses of MethodInfo in org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect that return MethodInfo
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    MethodInfo
    MethodInfo.accessible()
     
    MethodInfo
    ClassInfo.getEnclosingMethod()
    Returns the MethodInfo object representing the method that declares this class if this is a local or anonymous class declared within a method.
    MethodInfo
    ParameterInfo.getMethod()
    Returns the method that this parameter belongs to.
    MethodInfo
    ClassInfo.getRepeatedAnnotationMethod()
    Returns the repeated annotation method on this class.
    static final MethodInfo
    ReflectionUtils.info(Method o)
    Returns the MethodInfo wrapper for the specified method.
    static MethodInfo
    MethodInfo.of(Class<?> declaringClass, Method inner)
    Creates a MethodInfo wrapper for the specified method.
    static MethodInfo
    MethodInfo.of(Method inner)
    Creates a MethodInfo wrapper for the specified method.
    static MethodInfo
    MethodInfo.of(ClassInfo declaringClass, Method inner)
    Creates a MethodInfo wrapper for the specified method.
    Methods in org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect that return types with arguments of type MethodInfo
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Optional<MethodInfo>
    ClassInfo.findGetter(String propertyName)
    Finds a public getter method for the specified bean property name.
    Optional<MethodInfo>
    ClassInfo.findSetter(String propertyName)
    Finds a public setter method for the specified bean property name.
    List<MethodInfo>
    ClassInfo.getAllMethods()
    Returns all declared methods on this class and all parent classes in child-to-parent order.
    List<MethodInfo>
    ClassInfo.getAllMethodsTopDown()
    Returns all declared methods on this class and all parent classes in parent-to-child order.
    Optional<MethodInfo>
    ClassInfo.getDeclaredMethod(Predicate<MethodInfo> filter)
    Returns the first matching declared method on this class.
    List<MethodInfo>
    ClassInfo.getDeclaredMethods()
    Returns all methods declared on this class.
    List<MethodInfo>
    MethodInfo.getMatchingMethods()
    Returns this method and all matching methods up the hierarchy chain.
    Optional<MethodInfo>
    AnnotationInfo.getMethod(String methodName)
    Returns the method with the specified name on this annotation.
    Optional<MethodInfo>
    ClassInfo.getMethod(Predicate<MethodInfo> filter)
    Returns the first matching method on this class.
    Optional<MethodInfo>
    ClassInfo.getPublicMethod(Predicate<MethodInfo> filter)
    Returns the first matching public method on this class.
    List<MethodInfo>
    ClassInfo.getPublicMethods()
    Returns all public methods on this class and parent classes.
    Methods in org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect with parameters of type MethodInfo
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    int
    MethodInfo.compareTo(MethodInfo o)
     
    <A extends Annotation>
    List<AnnotationInfo<A>>
    AnnotationProvider.find(Class<A> type, MethodInfo m, AnnotationTraversal... traversals)
    Finds annotations from a method using configurable traversal options.
    List<AnnotationInfo<? extends Annotation>>
    AnnotationProvider.find(MethodInfo m, AnnotationTraversal... traversals)
    Finds all annotations from a method using configurable traversal options, without filtering by annotation type.
    Property.Builder<T,V>
    Property.Builder.getter(MethodInfo method)
    Sets the producer (getter) from a MethodInfo.
    <A extends Annotation>
    boolean
    AnnotationProvider.has(Class<A> type, MethodInfo m, AnnotationTraversal... traversals)
    Checks if a method has the specified annotation.
    boolean
    MethodInfo.matches(MethodInfo m)
    Returns true if this method matches the specified method by name and parameter types.
    Property.Builder<T,V>
    Property.Builder.setter(MethodInfo method)
    Sets the consumer (setter) from a MethodInfo.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description

    ClassInfo.getDeclaredMethod(Predicate<MethodInfo> filter)
    Returns the first matching declared method on this class.
    Optional<MethodInfo>
    ClassInfo.getMethod(Predicate<MethodInfo> filter)
    Returns the first matching method on this class.
    Optional<MethodInfo>
    ClassInfo.getPublicMethod(Predicate<MethodInfo> filter)
    Returns the first matching public method on this class.
